notes: John Henry Gemeny II and Matilda 'Milly' Figg. Married June 23, 1816 in Alexandria, VA. Known children: Richard Henry (1825-1873), Andrew (1829-1882), Mary Elizabeth (1832-1891), Benjamin (1835-1895), Edgar John (1839-1924), Amelia (1841-1843). Only Andrew and Benjamin are fully seeded — others to be added.
